fields.label: Endpoint port
fields.help: Loopback port for http://127.0.0.1:<port>/mcp. Restart the bot after changing.

fields.label: Allow write tools
fields.help: Registers message/channel/role write tools. Off means clients never see them.

fields.label: Allow moderation tools
fields.help: Registers kick/ban/timeout tools. Keep off unless an agent must moderate.
